name: Groundnut Stew
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat the peanut oil in a large pot over medium heat. Add the onions and sauté for about 10 minutes, stirring occasionally until they are golden brown.
2. Stir in the cayenne pepper and garlic. Sauté for an additional 2-3 minutes.
3. Add the chopped cabbage and sweet potatoes to the pot. Cover and continue cooking over medium heat for a few more minutes.
4. Mix in the tomato juice, apple juice, salt, grated ginger, cilantro, and chopped tomatoes. Stir well to combine.
5. Bring the mixture to a simmer and cover the pot. Cook on low heat for about 15 minutes or until the sweet potatoes are tender.
6. Add the okra and cook an additional 5 minutes.
7. Stir in the peanut butter and taste. If needed, add more juice (apple juice or tomato juice) to reach your desired consistency.
8. Place the pot on a heat diffuser and allow it to simmer gently until ready to serve.
